# Kodeck

> Your command center for Claude Code — a multi-project IDE built around the Claude CLI.

Kodeck is an open-source, MIT-licensed application that provides a graphical interface for Claude Code. It allows developers to manage multiple projects, git worktrees, chat sessions, and terminals in a unified workspace.

## Quick Start

Run `npx kodeck-app` to start Kodeck. Requires Node.js 22+ and Claude Code authentication (OAuth via `claude login`).

## Features

- Multi-Project Workspace: Register multiple repositories and navigate projects, worktrees, and branches from a unified sidebar.
- Built for Claude Code: Deep CLI integration with streaming responses, tool call cards, and permission prompts rendered natively.
- Advanced Search: Search across all sessions, messages, and projects instantly.
- Config Browser: Visual read-only view of Claude configurations, permissions, and hooks.
- Terminal + Chat Split: Side-by-side terminal and chat panels for seamless workflow.
- Cross-Platform: Available as a browser app or native macOS desktop application via Tauri.
- Free & Open Source: MIT licensed. No telemetry, no accounts, no paywalls.
- DX First: Keyboard-driven, fast renders, zero config to start.

## Roadmap

- Smart Recommendations: Context-aware suggestions that learn your workflow.
- Telegram Integration: Monitor sessions and interact with Claude directly from Telegram.
- Intelligent Plugins: On-the-fly plugin recommendations tailored to your current context.

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, xterm.js
- Backend: Hono (HTTP + WebSocket server)
- Desktop: Tauri (native macOS app)
- npm package: kodeck-app

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/vladzima/kodeck
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/kodeck-app
- Website: https://kodeck.dev
- Author: Vlad Arbatov (https://github.com/vladzima)
